title: Crispy Ethiopian Beef Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry dish made with crispy onions, tender beef, and Ethiopian spices.

ingredients.name: beef
ingredients.notes: sirloin steak, sliced into thin strips

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced beef and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until browned and cooked through.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the skillet.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, or until fragrant.
Add the chopped crispy onions and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until tender.
Add the Ethiopian spice blend and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the beef broth and stir-fry sauce to the skillet, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened and the beef is coated.
Serve hot over steamed rice or with injera bread.
